based_on: Byte-precise mutation of fixtures/mazur.golden.jsonl (engine-emitted canonical bytes). The bad fixture differs from the golden in exactly two places: the fixture_status block (3 fields) and the single targeted numeric value.

what_was_NOT_mutated: backward.output_error_signals.o1.factors[*].value (product of factors still equals the original signal_value)
backward.hidden_error_signals.* (downstream backprop is computed from o1's stored signal_value the engine wrote; the downstream values still match what they were computed from)
updates[*] (gradients remain as the engine emitted them)
all other parameter updates' factor values

single_target_invariant: Reconciliation produces exactly one Rule 1 failure, and that failure names o1 (backward.output_error_signals.o1.signal_value). A Rule 8 cascade is expected and acceptable: updates[4] (w5) and updates[5] (w6) carry factors[0].from = 'backward.output_error_signals.o1.signal_value' with the original factor value -0.138498562, so when Rule 8 resolves the path it sees the mutated source -0.138497562 and reports the divergence. Rule 1 is the originating rule; Rule 8 failures on w5/w6 are downstream provenance cascades.
cascading_failures_observed: Rule 8 on updates[4].optimizer.factors[0] (w5): factor.from='backward.output_error_signals.o1.signal_value', factor.value=-0.138498562, resolved source=-0.138497562, delta=1.0e-6 (cascade of Rule 1)
Rule 8 on updates[5].optimizer.factors[0] (w6): same cascade — w6 also references o1.signal_value
failure_priority_assertion: Per docs/reconciliation.md, reconciliation failures report before fixture-lifecycle failures. The fixture_status.verification_state = 'expected_to_fail_reconciliation' on this fixture must NOT mask the Rule 1 failure.
purpose: Anti-circularity (Csmith / CompCert lineage): proves the reconciler checks Rule 1 (output error signal product consistency) by detecting a 1e-6 mismatch (1000x the 1e-9 tolerance) between stored signal_value and the product of the (unmutated) factors. Without Rule 1 implementation, this fixture would silently pass.
